title: Background notification path without observable status is flagged
text:
diff --git a/src/semantic_guard/notifier.py b/src/semantic_guard/notifier.py
--- a/src/semantic_guard/notifier.py
+++ b/src/semantic_guard/notifier.py
@@
+import subprocess
+
+def run_background_notification(payload: str) -> None:
+    subprocess.Popen(["notify-send", payload])
rationale: Background notification behavior needs logging, status, returncode, or an explicit reason why observability is unnecessary.
